business_description.nature_of_business: Industrial property ownership and management; portfolio comprises warehouse and logistics centers, manufacturing facilities, flex space, and a corporate administrative office across Ohio

coverages_discussed.notes: Aggregate building value across 9 locations; expiring premium reflects total property program inclusive of contents and business interruption coverages. LOC-009 carries $0 building value (tenant-occupied office).
Aggregate contents value across all 9 locations.
Aggregate BI value across all 9 locations.

positives: 8 of 9 locations (89%) have sprinkler systems installed
Dominant construction class is Non-Combustible or Masonry Non-Combustible; one Fire Resistive location (LOC-009)
Majority of portfolio is modern vintage — 6 of 9 locations built between 2004 and 2019
Three consecutive claim-free policy years: 2022 (Chubb), 2023 (Hartford), 2024 (Liberty Mutual)
Overall program premium has declined 14.5% from $458,666 in 2021 to $392,002 in 2024
All warehouse and manufacturing locations are single-story, reducing vertical fire spread risk
Total portfolio TIV of $251,345,000 spread across 9 locations provides geographic diversification within Ohio
concerns: LOC-007 (Toledo Industrial Park - Building 2, Manufacturing) has no sprinkler system
LOC-004 (Dayton Manufacturing Facility) is Joisted Masonry construction — the highest-risk construction class in the portfolio and the oldest building (1992)
LOC-007 combines the portfolio's only non-sprinklered building with a Manufacturing occupancy and EPDM roof, compounding risk concentration

Loss summary reflects 2 total property claims with $238,554 incurred, while the 4-year prior insurance history shows only 1 claim year (2021) — discrepancy suggests either multiple claims in 2021 or claims predating the history provided
Three different carriers utilized across the 4-year period reviewed (Hartford, Chubb, Hartford, Liberty Mutual), indicating potential market instability or carrier non-renewal activity
Outstanding incurred-vs-paid gap of $35,679 ($238,554 incurred vs. $202,875 paid) suggests at least one open or partially reserved claim
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Property coverage: 2 total claims, $202,875 paid, $238,554 total incurred (reserve gap of $35,679). Prior insurance history shows 1 claim in 2021 under Hartford Financial Services; policy years 2022 (Chubb Limited), 2023 (Hartford Financial Services), and 2024 (Liberty Mutual Insurance) are all claim-free. A discrepancy exists between the 2-claim loss summary total and the single claim-year reflected in the 4-year carrier history.
